caddy_2k_cluster.name: Instrument cluster
caddy_2k_cluster.location_rhd: Dashboard directly ahead of the driver
caddy_2k_cluster.notes: Cluster type determines whether OBD, EEPROM or bench access is appropriate.

caddy_2k_late_cluster.name: Later instrument cluster
caddy_2k_late_cluster.function: MQB-style immobiliser data and key authorisation
caddy_2k_late_cluster.location_rhd: Dashboard directly ahead of the driver
caddy_2k_late_cluster.notes: Do not assume all late Caddy dashboards share one service-mode or bench procedure.

caddy_sb_access_start.name: Instrument cluster / access-start authorisation system
caddy_sb_access_start.function: Later MQB vehicle authorisation; implementation varies with keyed or KESSY specification
caddy_sb_access_start.location_rhd: Vehicle-specific; confirm through diagnosis before dismantling
